Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Curated external (hand-maintained)">
Composed compose-external-wave-4 using authoring SSOT (`docs/src/authoring/skills/ecosystem-primer.mdx`) + research. Do not run `wagents docs generate` on this file (HAND-MAINTAINED sentinel). Run `/review source` before using in production or promoting.
</Aside>

## What It Does

Part of official langchain-ai/langchain-skills (early dev, ~800 stars). ecosystem-primer: start-here for choosing LangChain vs LangGraph vs Deep Agents, env setup, next skills. langchain-fundamentals: agents via create_agent, tools, structured output, middleware. langchain-middleware: HITL approval, custom middleware, Command resume. langchain-rag: RAG (loaders, embeddings, vector stores). langchain-dependencies: version pinning ref for py/ts.

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add langchain-ai/langchain-skills --skill ecosystem-primer --skill langchain-fundamentals --skill langgraph-fundamentals --skill langgraph-human-in-the-loop --skill langgraph-persistence --skill langchain-rag --skill deep-agents-core --skill deep-agents-memory --skill deep-agents-orchestration --skill langchain-middleware --skill langchain-dependencies --skill managed-deep-agents -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Inspect first** (`needs-inspection`)

Curated status: `inspect-then-install`

Risk notes: Extended LangChain row with Deep Agents core/memory/orchestration, middleware/HITL, dependency pinning, and Managed Deep Agents ops. Confirm source-list slugs before apply.

Entry maintained via authoring + research for compose-external-wave-4; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Install Prerequisites

Install (group): npx skills add langchain-ai/langchain-skills --skill ecosystem-primer --skill langchain-fundamentals --skill langgraph-fundamentals ... --skill langchain-rag --skill deep-agents-* ... -y -g -a [agents]; status=inspect-then-install; selector=named. Set API keys post-install.
